comment: Clean Code was easy to follow, and Robert C. Martin's main ideas actually stayed clear from start to finish.
I liked how Clean Code balances useful detail with readable pacing. It never felt like homework the whole way through.
Clean Code had a few slow sections, but the best parts were genuinely helpful and worth the time.
This one made sense fast. Robert C. Martin explains the core ideas in Clean Code without making them feel overcomplicated.
Clean Code was solid overall. Not perfect, but I would still recommend it to someone picking a practical read.
